CustomField.formula: AND( HOMEtracker__Property__c !="", !CONTAINS(Name, "Test"), OR( AND( Eligibility_Date__c >= DATE( 2015,1,1), ISBLANK(Date_Invoiced__c)), AND( Assistance_Complete_Date__c >=DATE( 2015,1,1), ISBLANK(Date_Assistance_Invoiced__c)), AND( HOMEtracker__Close_Date__c >=DATE( 2015,1,1), ISBLANK(Date_Closing_Invoiced__c)), AND( Date_Application_Terminated_Withdrawn__c >=DATE( 2015,1,1), ISBLANK(Date_Invoice_Processed__c)) ) )
CustomField.label: Show on AA Billing CALC
